# truenas_datasets (Data Source)

Lists ZFS datasets on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_datasets" "all" {}

output "dataset_ids" {
  value = [for d in data.truenas_datasets.all.datasets : d.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `parent_dataset` (String) Optional parent dataset filter. Only datasets whose ID starts with this prefix are returned.
- `pool` (String) Optional pool filter. Only datasets in this pool are returned.

### Read-Only

- `datasets` (Attributes List) List of datasets matching the filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--datasets))

<a id="nestedatt--datasets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `datasets`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Full dataset ID (e.g., tank/data).
- `mount_point` (String) Mount point.
- `name` (String) Dataset name.
- `pool` (String) Pool the dataset belongs to.
- `type` (String) Dataset type (FILESYSTEM or VOLUME).
